project_type: Python async monitoring platform with Telegram userbot, notification bot, Flask trap server, FastAPI dashboard
build_system: pip with requirements.txt, Docker for production deployment
test_framework: pytest with pytest-asyncio for async tests
verification_instructions: 1. Install requirements.txt successfully. 2. Run pytest tests/. 3. Verify all imports resolve correctly with python -c 'from core.config import Settings'. 4. Run python -m py_compile main.py on all .py files.
setup_instructions: 1. cd /projects/sandbox/Export-bot/anti_stalker_pro. 2. pip install -r requirements.txt. 3. Copy .env.example to .env and fill in values. 4. python main.py
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Python 3.11+ available via pyenv. Can install any pip packages.
contribution_requirements: Follow the existing deploy.sh pattern from teleexport for the deployment script. All credentials via .env file. Type hints on all functions. Full docstrings. No TODO or placeholder comments.
key_patterns: Existing teleexport uses: Telethon for Telegram MTProto, pathlib for paths, async/await patterns, systemd for service management. New bot uses Pydantic BaseSettings for config, SQLAlchemy 2.0 async ORM, APScheduler for task scheduling.
directory_structure: anti_stalker_pro/ at /projects/sandbox/Export-bot/anti_stalker_pro/ with subdirectories: core/, userbot/, intelligence/, trapnet/, bot/, dashboard/, scheduler/, storage/, tests/
